key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut handled by GNOME Shell to start or stop Wordpipe dictation.

key.name: backend
key.description: Selected ASR backend exposed by the Wordpipe service.

key.name: model-profile
key.description: Wordpipe model profile, such as fast or compact.

key.name: input-device
key.description: CPAL input device selector. Empty means the system default input device.

key.name: model-root
key.description: Directory containing installed Wordpipe model profiles. Empty means the service default.

key.name: num-threads
key.description: Number of intra-op threads used by the ASR worker.

key.name: sample-rate
key.description: Input sample rate requested from the capture backend.

key.name: spoken-punctuation
key.description: Enable spoken punctuation handling in the service.

key.name: insert-partials
key.description: Insert append-only streaming deltas as soon as they are emitted by the service.

key.name: stream-insert-delay-ms
key.description: Additional delay before inserting streaming text, in milliseconds.

key.name: show-overlay
key.description: Show an on-screen status overlay while dictation is active.
